title: Reserve archive budget before release metadata rebinding
outOfScope: Starting the original plan Work Items

sources.reason: Current archiveGrowth ceiling is 493 and the next metadata Work Item requires one additional immutable archive record.
Authoritative current archive sequence and predecessor evidence.
Release remains gated by serial Work Item closure and complete release evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: Bounded policy-only reservation for the next immutable archive record.

executionDecision.reason: User authorized root-cause budget reservation before release metadata implementation.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: The archiveGrowth ceiling is raised from 493 to exactly 494 with an explicit user-owned repayment record.
The change is limited to governance budget policy and preserves immutable evidence.
The complete Finish Gate, PR, merge, ai-close-work-item, branch cleanup, and synchronized-base evidence is recorded.
guidelines: Reserve only the measured next archive record; do not widen unrelated limits.
Do not rewrite immutable archives or generate release metadata in this budget Work Item.

intent.problem: The next release metadata Work Item will add one immutable archive record, moving archiveGrowth from 493 to 494; the current policy has no reserved headroom.
constraints: Change only the governance budget policy and lifecycle evidence for this Work Item.
Do not start release metadata implementation or publish a release before this Work Item closes.
Preserve all prior immutable archive evidence.
intent.rationale: A dedicated budget reservation makes the projected archive cost explicit before the metadata Work Item starts, preventing another late CI/PR budget failure.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly authorized process correction and bounded budget reservations before release.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Current archiveGrowth=493 is reserved to become exactly 494 for the next metadata Work Item.
The policy record identifies this Work Item, user authority, date, and repayment rationale.

rawUserRequest: 预算不足必须在事前检查中拦截；先完成预算流程修正，再按完整 Contract/Preflight/PR/合并/ai-close-work-item 流程继续发布，不绕过任何计划工单。

declaredIntent.summary: Reserve exactly one projected archive record before the release metadata Work Item.
